prestazioni: Replace the stock H27A 2.7L V6 with a fully built H27A Type-R block (forged internals by Tomei, including billet crankshaft, forged pistons with 12.5:1 compression ratio, and Carrillo connecting rods) paired with a custom dry-sump oiling system by Peterson Fluid Systems to handle 10,000+ RPM under Pikes Peak conditions.

Turbocharger upgrade to a Garrett GT4202R with a 106mm compressor wheel and 94mm turbine, mated to a custom 4-inch titanium exhaust manifold by HKS and a secondary wastegate system (Tial MV-R 60mm) to manage 2.2 bar of boost at 8,500 RPM, feeding into a custom intercooler core by PWR with dual 4-inch inlet/outlet piping.

Fuel system overhaul featuring a dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump setup, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors (2,000cc/min), and a Motec M150 ECU with custom Pikes Peak-specific mapping, including anti-lag and launch control strategies optimized for the 156-turn course, paired with a Nitrous Express direct-port NOS system (150hp shot) for altitude compensation.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Rocket Bunny Escudo PP V6 kit (200mm fender flares, custom front splitter with integrated dive planes, and a 1,200mm rear wing with adjustable Gurney flaps by APR Performance), all finished in 3M Matte Graphite with Pikes Peak livery decals by Driftworks.

Custom roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, 6-point design with integrated fire suppression system by Lifeline, and carbon fiber door bars for weight reduction), paired with a Sparco Pro 2000 seat and Schroth 6-point harnesses, all bolted to a stripped and seam-welded chassis with polycarbonate windows (Lexan 3mm) for weight savings.

Functional aero package including a custom front diffuser by APR with vortex generators, a rear diffuser by Voltex with integrated exhaust cutouts, and a roof-mounted air scoop by Seibon Carbon feeding the intercooler and engine bay, all coated in Zircotec ThermoHold ceramic heat shielding to manage underhood temperatures.
